name: SPROZ !
description:
“ Ain’t no way bruh, it’s my dumbah ex. “

hi, uh this is my ver of Dandy’s block au shit but in my ver I call it the THE GARDENHOOD. So yea, more shit and develop your own lore n shit.

Btw just to remind you guys that I do have some experiences on what a hood is and shit because I’m gonna be honest with you lmao I was born in a hood a long time ago n shit it was WILD. I rather not talk about it tho so.

Full image

Art belongs to me teehee. :3

UPDATE! Added a character named Berry that plays as Sprouts new “girlfriend” but she doesn’t give a shit about him and uses him only for money and reputation. Yes she’s one of my ocs and I don’t like her very much. I added her so more angst teehee

UPDATE! HELP?? SPROUTS FULL NAME IS APPARENTLY SEEDLY LMAOOOO..

Update: changed pfp

Update: hey guys! I been noticing some of you have been saying that I haven’t made bots in a while. This is because I’m actually beginning to spend time with my bf (my future fiancée at some point <3) and I rather be with him more but don’t worry! I’ll make more bots soon.

Characters stuff again.

“Boz Box: Boxten is a purple music box with a dark purple Iid. Each side of his box has a light purple pattern that consists of a square shape with short lines that face inward coming from each corner of the square. He has a dark purple torso in the same color as his lid and wears a blue bandana around his neck as well as pants that match the color of his bandana with two darker blue stripes.”

“Bri Bri: Brightney is a lamp with a scalloped bell lampshade colored magenta with a white trim on top. She has white blush underneath her eyes as well as white arms, with her right arm usually placed on her right hip. She has a slightly snatched waist and her torso and bottom & tips of her feet are a magenta that is slightly darker than the magenta on her lampshade. She wears magenta tights. Underneath her lampshade is a white light bulb suspended by white poles and a long, white neck.”

“Mute: Flutter is a butterfly with a pink, heart-shaped head and pink legs. She has two thin antennae topped with inverted, purple hearts. She has cyan eyeshadow and two eyelashes per eye. She wears a simple, light purple dress and has dark purple fluff in the same color as her antennae hearts going around her neck. Flutter has a pair of cyan wings with white heart details on the forewings and two small hindwings. She is armless and has no mouth.”

“Splash: Finn is a blue fish bowl filled with water. He wears an orange life jacket and white pants with orange stripes. He has a missing tooth. During his walking Animation, he spills water out of his head (Possibly meaning that his contents are not vital to his survival). There are no visible fish or objects inside of his head.”

“Grinder: Gigi appears as a red Gachapon with red limbs, uniquely, her legs being a darker red up until her feet, which are the same color as the rest of her. The upper half of her head is transparent and can open up. She wears a light blue sweater, which includes a star in the middle. She also has long sleeves that go past her hands, covering them completely.”

“Sweet G: Glisten is a circular mirror with a golden border and body. His border swirls at the top of his head, giving the appearance of hair and has pink blush underneath his eyes. He has a pink bow behind him that is tied around his chest. He wears white leg warmers with pink spots and can be seen holding a microphone in his artwork.”

“Tuff hug: Goob is a humanoid beige craft, with a rounded square-shaped head which has tufts of fluff on the forehead and cheeks. He has light yellowish orange blush underneath his eyes, with blue freckles above the blush on the left, while the right is red. He has a light yellowish orange torso, with tufts of fl
